mapper.select:
SELECT p.code as code, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.expiry_date as "expiryDate", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.state_id as "stateId" FROM promo_code p
AND p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND p.discount_type = #{discountType} AND p.state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT p.code as code, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.expiry_date as "expiryDate", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.state_id as "stateId" FROM promo_code p WHERE p.code = #{code}
